entry.title: IDC HT940214D0001 (P00080) awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL CHANGE (TPM135) INTO THE CONTRACT FOR MAINTAINING NUMERICAL ORDER OF THE MANUAL.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0001 (P00081) awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 2. IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR CLAUSE 52.217-9, OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT (MAR 2000), THE GOVERNMENT HEREBY EXERCISES OPTION PERIOD 2 FOR DENTAL HEALTH CARE SERVICES FOR THE PERIOD 1 AUGUST 2015 THROUGH 31 JULY 2016.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0001 (P00082) awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CHANGE 136 OF THE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL (TPM136) ENTITLED, "NATIONAL DEFENSE AUTHORIZATION ACT FISCAL YEAR 2015 SECTION 706, BREASTFEEDING SUPPORT." THIS CHANGE IS ONLY FOR THE PURPOSE OF MAINTAINING THE CHRONOLOGICAL AND NUMERICAL ORDER OF THE MANUAL UPDATES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0001 (P00083) awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT CHANGE 137 OF THE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL (TPM137), CHANGE 145 OF THE TRICARE OPERATIONS MANUAL (TOM145), AND CHANGE 74 OF THE TRICARE SYSTEMS MANUAL (TSM74). THESE CHANGES ARE ONLY FOR THE PURPOSE OF MAINTAINING THE CHRONOLOGICAL AND NUMERICAL ORDER OF THE MANUAL UPDATES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
